issues.detail: The instructions do not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases such as missing skills or installation failures.
The skill file contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The CLI requires Node.js 18+ and specific agent paths, limiting use on non-Node or unsupported agents.

scenarios.name: Find, inspect, and install a Coolify skill for Claude Code
scenarios.rationale: Baseline has no awareness of terminal-skills CLI and resorts to manual GitHub copying; treatment uses search/info/install with auto-detection and the .claude/skills path.

scenarios.name: Search REST API for accessibility skills and fetch SKILL.md
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lacks knowledge of the public /api/v1/skills endpoints; treatment hits /api/v1/skills?q= and /api/v1/skills/<slug> with jq to extract bodyMarkdown.
